author: tersec
content: Investigating the https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-5.ethpandaops.io/slot/118512 and https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-5.ethpandaops.io/slot/118618 misses which Dora attributes to https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-5.ethpandaops.io/validator/5865 and https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-5.ethpandaops.io/validator/5864 and calls `nimbus-reth-1`, well, see the complete list of 200 validator keys that node knows about and it's neither. Those 200 validators live in the contiguous range 5870 through 6069 inclusive. Those misses are not `nimbus-reth-1` validators  or misses

author: tersec
